title: Red Light, Green Light
description: A recreation of Squid Game's Red Light, Green Light game.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f196a4b2a997ff7e3689da49b6c453d890f0ad9c.png)
# A recreation of the popular kids game as seen in Squid Game!

### This plugin **MAY** work on versions outide of the listed support, however, I WILL NOT be proving support for those versions.

## How to Use:
/redlightgreenlight [red/green/exception]

**red**: Makes the light turn red. You have 1 second to come to a complete stop.

**green**: Makes the light turn green. You're free to move

**exception**: Allows players to remain unaffected. To use, run /redlightgreenlight exception (add/remove) [PLAYER NAME]

## So, what's next?
I have a few ideas for the future of this plugin:
- Automatic gameplay mode
- Working sound effects
- A life system
